steps.title: Recognize x from the first equation
steps.content: The first equation states $x = 8$ directly. This is already the $x$-coordinate of the intersection point, so no solving is needed.

steps.title: Substitute into the second equation
steps.content:
Now substitute $x = 8$ into the second equation $y = x^2 + 7$:
$$y = (8)^2 + 7 = 64 + 7 = 71$$
The $y$-coordinate at the intersection is 71. That matches choice D — D is correct.
